1.description: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. This move always goes first.

2.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

3.description: The user condenses energy within its body and unleashes that energy from its core to inflict damage.

4.description: The user vibrates to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

5.description: A vortex of air is shot at the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

6.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

7.description: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

8.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

9.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

10.description: The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also harshly lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

11.description: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

12.description: The user attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

13.description: The user attacks the target by throwing a clump of special mud. All stat changes are eliminated.

14.description: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.

15.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

16.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

17.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

18.description: One turn after this move is used, the user's or its replacement's HP is restored by up to half the user's max HP.

19.description: This move is either physical or special—whichever will inflict more damage. This may also poison the target.

20.description: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn deals physical damage to the target.

21.description: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

22.description: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

23.description: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

24.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

25.description: The user rotates its gears, boosting its Attack stat and sharply boosting its Speed stat.

26.description: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

27.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

28.description: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

29.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

30.description: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

31.description: The user regenerates its cells, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

32.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

33.description: The user unleashes a strong beam. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

34.description: The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.

35.description: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.

36.description: The user restores its own HP by the same amount as the target's Attack stat. It then lowers the target's Attack stat.

37.description: The user strikes everything around it by letting loose a flare of electricity. This may also leave those hit by the attack with paralysis.

38.description: The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

39.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with explosive fury. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

40.description: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

41.description: The user extends its shadow and attacks the target from behind. This move always goes first.

42.description: The user attacks the target by scattering petals for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

43.description: Although this move has great power, it works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

44.description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

45.description: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

46.description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

47.description: The user traps the target inside a maelstrom of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

48.description: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

49.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

50.description: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.

51.description: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This move always lands a critical hit.

52.description: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

53.description: The user crashes into the target while rotating its body like a drill. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

54.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

55.description: The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

56.description: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.

57.description: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

58.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

59.description: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with a burn.

60.description: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

61.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot and may leave the target with a burn.

62.description: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

63.description: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

64.description: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

65.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

66.description: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

67.description: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

68.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

69.description: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

70.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

71.description: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

72.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

73.description: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to cause paralysis.

74.description: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.

75.description: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

76.description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

77.description: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

78.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

79.description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

80.description: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

81.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

82.description: The target is hammered with a large pincer. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

83.description: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

84.description: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

85.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

86.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

87.description: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only when it is snowing.

88.description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

89.description: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those it hits.

90.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

91.description: The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also boosts the user's Speed stat. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

92.description: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

93.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

94.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

95.description: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

96.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

97.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

98.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

99.description: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

100.description: The user attacks the target by emitting steam. This may also confuse the target.

101.description: The user slacks off, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

102.description: The user lets loose a damaging burst of light. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

103.description: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

104.description: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

105.description: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

106.description: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.

107.description: The user inflicts damage by dropping an apple from high above. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

108.description: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

109.description: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

110.description: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

111.description: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

112.description: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

113.description: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

114.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

115.description: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to lash the target.

116.description: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

117.description: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.

118.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

119.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

120.description: The user attacks by launching sharp icicles at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

121.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, if any. If a wild Pokémon uses this move, it flees.

122.description: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

123.description: The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

124.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

125.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

126.description: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status conditions cured.

127.description: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.

128.description: The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.

129.description: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

130.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

131.description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

132.description: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

133.description: Morpeko attacks and boosts its Speed stat with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form.

134.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

135.description: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

136.description: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

137.description: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

138.description: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.

139.description: The user surrounds itself with a great amount of electricity and charges the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

140.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

141.description: The user nimbly strikes the target. This attack does massive damage if the user isn't holding an item.

142.description: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

143.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

144.description: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

145.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

146.description: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

147.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

148.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

149.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

150.description: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

151.description: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

152.description: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

153.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

154.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

155.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by manifesting the power of the land in fearsome blades of stone.

156.description: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws to inflict damage.

157.description: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.

158.description: The user spouts water to damage opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

159.description: Cloaking itself in flame, the user attacks the target. Then, building up momentum, the user boosts its Speed stat.

160.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

161.description: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.

162.description: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

163.description: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

164.description: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

165.description: The target is knocked away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

166.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

168.description: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and cuts the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

169.description: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

170.description: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

171.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

172.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

173.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

174.description: The target is thrown, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

175.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

176.description: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the user while it's heating up its beak results in a burn.

177.description: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

178.description: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.

179.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

180.description: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

181.description: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.

182.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

183.description: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

184.description: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

185.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

186.description: The user boosts all its stats by using some of its own HP.

187.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

188.description: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

189.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

190.description: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.

191.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

192.description: The target is razed with a mystical fire of great intensity. This may also leave the target with a burn.

193.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

194.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

195.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

196.description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

197.description: The user slams its rugged body into the target to attack. This also damages the user quite a lot.

198.description: The user drains the target's energy with its horns. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

199.description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

200.description: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

201.description: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

202.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

203.description: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

204.description: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack opposing Pokémon. The user's Defense stat is lowered after the attack.

205.description: The user bursts into song, emitting many bubbles. Any Pokémon suffering from a burn will be cured by the touch of these bubbles.

206.description: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

207.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

208.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

209.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

210.description: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

211.description: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

212.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

213.description: The user attacks the target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

214.description: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

215.description: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the target. This move always goes first.

216.description: The user attacks by biting the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

217.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

218.description: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

219.description: The user turns the target's strength against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage this move inflicts.

220.description: The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

221.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This may also leave the target with a burn.

222.description: The user releases countless shots of light at the target. This move's type changes depending on the kind of plate held by the user.

223.description: The user attacks by slicing with a sword. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

224.description: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.

225.description: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

226.description: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stats upon switching into battle.

227.description: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

228.description: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

229.description: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target's spirit. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

230.description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

231.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

232.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

233.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

234.description: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

235.description: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.

236.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

237.description: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

238.description: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

239.description: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

240.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with a sharp claw made from shadows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

241.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has inflicted damage on the user in the same turn.

242.description: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP. It regains more HP in a sandstorm.

243.description: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.

244.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

245.description: The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.

246.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

247.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

248.description: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

249.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

250.description: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

251.description: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

252.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

253.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

254.description: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

255.description: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.

256.description: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.

257.description: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

258.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

259.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

260.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. This sharply boosts the user's Speed stat.

261.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

262.description: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

263.description: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.

264.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

265.description: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

266.description: The user attacks the target by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

267.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

268.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

269.description: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.

270.description: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.

271.description: The user attacks by crashing large icicles onto the target. This may also make the target flinch.

272.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

273.description: Cloaked in flames, the user attacks the target by dancing and flapping its wings. This may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

274.description: The user tears the target along with the space around it. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

275.description: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

276.description: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

277.description: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

278.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

279.description: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

280.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

281.description: The user lets loose a pulse of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

282.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

283.description: The user crashes into the target, delivering a powerful electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

284.description: The user coils up and concentrates. This boosts its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

285.description: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

286.description: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

287.description: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

288.description: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.

289.description: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user's Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

290.description: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

291.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

292.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

293.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

294.description: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

295.description: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

296.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

297.description: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also sharply boost the user's Defense stat.

298.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

299.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

300.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

301.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

302.description: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

303.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

304.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

305.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue.

306.description: The user throws down a giant lightning bolt. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous flame.

307.description: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two opposing Pokémon, this move hits each of them once.

308.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

309.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

310.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

312.description: Comets are summoned down from the sky onto the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

313.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

314.description: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

315.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

316.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, an arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

317.description: The user boasts its strength and attacks the target. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

318.description: The user attacks the target with a hazardous full-power headbutt. This also damages the user terribly.

319.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

320.description: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

321.description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

322.description: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

323.description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

324.description: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

325.description: The user scatters a cloud of soporific dust that puts the target to sleep.

326.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

327.description: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep.

328.description: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

329.description: The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.

330.description: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

331.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

332.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

333.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

334.description: The user trades held items with the target faster than the eye can follow.

335.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

336.description: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.

337.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

338.description: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

339.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

340.description: This move boosts all the user's stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.

341.description: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

342.description: The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.

343.description: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

344.description: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

345.description: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

346.description: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

347.description: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.

348.description: Using its many arms, the user unleashes a barrage of attacks that ignore the effects of moves like Protect and Detect. This also lowers the user's Defense stat.

349.description: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.
